scratchpadContent:
Since it is just a dev cluster, I went with approach of deleteing the acual state from AWS, Then start with applying openebs module, platform_services module

It failed in between where I had to investigate why it was failing, Obeservations are below

Cluster secret in some namespace fails specifially in Traefik namespace everytime. (since I have cleaned up cluster multiple time)

Opensearch Operator was failing due to some image pull. Imgare repo for kube-proxy was deprecated in upstream.

Alerts
Strimzi Operator got oom-killed in prod-skp
NodeMemoryMajorPagesFaults (check if any futher investigation may require)


Post 4 eye deployments
Followup on longhorn manager (prod-sysadmin cluster)
instance-manager-8c13b84a0f614972d784167cfaa37f1c pod disrubtion budget for

Temper monkey
numberphile
